rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §272.006 governs bilingual ballot translation requirements. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: bilingual printing of the ballot is not required if a Spanish translation of the ballot is posted in each voting station
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no overlap in subject matter.
